item.title: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall
item.description: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatt...

item.title: Kevin Warsh gave his preferred way for measuring inflation. It could come back to bite him
item.description: But Bank of America economist Aditya Bhave warned Wednesday that such a recalculation might not pan out as the former Fed governor hopes.

item.title: Trump extends Iran ceasefire — but market focus has already drifted elsewhere
item.description: Prospects for further negotiations remain uncertain, with Tehran and Washington offering conflicting signals on the ceasefire's status.

item.title: Tariff refunds begin on Monday. These retailers are due big paydays
item.description: U.S. importers, such as Walmart and Target, could be in line for billions in tariff refunds as the government launches its claims filing portal on Mon...

item.title: Chair nominee Kevin Warsh says Fed must ‘stay in its lane’ to maintain independence
item.description: Warsh also expressed firm commitment to fighting inflation with only one mention of the labor market.
